name: Western Blot
description: Western blot: SDS-PAGE separates denatured proteins by mass, proteins are electro-transferred to a membrane, and a primary/secondary antibody pair with chemiluminescent detection reveals the target band, with a transfer/probe troubleshooting loop.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["Protein lysate"]
    N2["Primary antibody"]
    N3["SDS-PAGE gel"]
    N4["Denature & load samples"]
    N5["SDS-PAGE: separate by MW"]
    N6["Electroblot to membrane"]
    N7["Block membrane"]
    N8["Probe primary Ab; wash"]
    N9["Secondary Ab-HRP; wash"]
    N10["Add ECL; image"]
    N11{"Band at expected MW?"}
    N12["Detected protein band"]

    N1 --> N4
    N3 --> N4
    N4 --> N5
    N5 --> N6
    N6 --> N7
    N7 --> N8
    N2 --> N8
    N8 --> N9
    N9 --> N10
    N10 --> N11
    N11 -->|troubleshoot| N6
    N11 -->|yes| N12

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N2 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N3 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style N4 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N5 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N6 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N7 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N8 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N9 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N10 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N11 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N12 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff

nodeDetails.label: Primary antibody
nodeDetails.detail: Antibody specific to the target protein

nodeDetails.label: Denature & load samples
nodeDetails.detail: Boil in SDS/reducing buffer; load wells

nodeDetails.label: SDS-PAGE: separate by MW
nodeDetails.detail: Electrophorese to resolve proteins by molecular weight

nodeDetails.label: Block membrane
nodeDetails.detail: Block with milk/BSA to limit nonspecific binding

nodeDetails.label: Band at expected MW?
nodeDetails.detail: Is there a specific band at the target molecular weight?

flowchartStandard.name: source_grounded_extraction_v2
flowchartStandard.sourceGrounding: Nodes, decisions, branches, and loops were extracted from the cited sources; each node carries a sourceRef to its supporting citation. Awaiting human spot-check before verified=true.

notes: Source-grounded extraction (v2): node content derived from cited protocol literature with per-node provenance; topology reflects the actual procedure.

sources.title: Electrophoretic transfer of proteins from polyacrylamide gels to nitrocellulose sheets: procedure and some applications
sources.authors: Towbin, H.; Staehelin, T.; Gordon, J.

sources.title: Western blotting: electrophoretic transfer of proteins from SDS-PAGE to unmodified nitrocellulose and radiographic detection with antibody and radioiodinated protein A
Western blot: technique, theory, and trouble shooting
sources.journal: North American Journal of Medical Sciences
